headline: Congress must modernize asylum policy before the justices upend it
snapshot: The Supreme Court is hearing a case that could impact asylum policy, and ultimately it is up to Congress to decide how to manage asylum at the border in a way that balances security and human dignity.
key_storylines: Congress must modernize asylum policy before the justices upend it
GOP tensions over DHS funding intensify between Senate, House Republicans
Senate Republicans push bill to authorize $400 million for White House ballroom
